g.text: Step 2: Run for N Protocol Periods
Step 3: Sample All Nodes for DEAD State

div.p: transport.SetPacketLoss(0.05) Sets 5% packet loss rate on SimulatedTransport
Assertion: go assert.Less(t, rate, 0.01, "False positive rate < 1%")
Iteration Counter Current: i / 1000 Period: 1s Total: ~17 minutes
Observer 1 sees: • A: ALIVE • B: ALIVE • C: DEAD ⚠️
Observer 2 sees: • A: ALIVE • B: ALIVE • C: ALIVE
Observer 3 sees: • A: ALIVE • B: ALIVE • C: ALIVE
